{{WIP}}

[[File:Heaven wheel tome.png|Frameless|right|150px|The Heaven Wheel Tome]]

=Heaven Wheel Tome=
The Heaven Wheel Tome is a consumable item unlocked alongside the [[Supreme Relic]] [[Virgo]] ($30k USD). When used, this item upgrades the [[Deadly Ironball]] increasing its damage by +30% and changing its appearance to the Heaven Wheel.<br>

[[File:Heaven Wheel CN TEMP.png|thumb|left|200px|The Heaven Wheel Trait Page (Borrowed from Chinese Servers)]]  
[[File:Heaven wheel.png|Frameless|thumb|left|150px|The Heaven Wheel Upgrade Icon]]

[[Category:Realm Trait]]
